# A Treatise of Human Nature

*[David Hume](../philosophers/hume.md) · 1739*

Hume's ambitious early work, which seeks to apply the experimental method to human nature. He there reduces the self to a **bundle of perceptions**, analyses causation as a custom of the mind, and argues that reason is the slave of the passions.
